title: scaevola graminea
intro: Scaevola graminea, also known as the fan flower or blue fan flower, is a flowering plant native to Australia and the Pacific Islands, characterized by its delicate, fan-shaped flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Scaevola graminea include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Scaevola graminea can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
